zh.Evesham, Worcestershire, England: 英國武斯特斯爾艾維沙安
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Fowler IV於1350年出生在英國波克夏時，他的父親John Fowler III30歲，母親Johan de Hartleigh28歲。他於1378年與Margaret Loveday在英國英格蘭波克夏結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1412年在英國巴金哈姆爾享年62歲，埋葬在英國波克夏布雷。

zh-hans.Evesham, Worcestershire, England: 英国武斯特斯爾艾維沙安
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Fowler IV于1350年出生在英国波克夏时，他的父亲John Fowler III30岁，母亲Johan de Hartleigh28岁。他于1378年与Margaret Loveday在英国英格兰波克夏结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1412年在英国巴金哈姆爾享年62岁，埋葬在英国波克夏布雷。

nameMeanings.name: Fowler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a fowler, a hunter or trapper of wild birds (a common medieval occupation), from Middle English fogheler, fugheler (Old English fugelere, a derivative of fugol ‘bird’).

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John Fowler IV was born in 1350, in Berkshire, England, his father, John Fowler III, was 30 and his mother, Johan de Hartleigh, was 28. He married Margaret Loveday in 1378, in Berkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1412, in Buckinghamshire, England, at the age of 62, and was buried in Bray, Berkshire, England.

fr.Vale of White Horse District, Shrivenham: Vale of White Horse, Oxfordshire, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Fowler IV est né en 1350, à Berkshire, Angleterre, son père, John Fowler III, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Johan de Hartleigh, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Loveday en 1378, à Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1412, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Bray, Berkshire, Angleterre.

de.Vale of White Horse District, Shrivenham: Vale of White Horse, Oxfordshire, England
de.lifeSummary: Als John Fowler IV 1350 in Berkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Fowler III 30 und seine Mutter Johan de Hartleigh 28. Er hat 1378 in Berkshire, England, United Kingdom Margaret Loveday geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1412 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Buckinghamshire, England und wurde in Bray, Berkshire, England begraben.

it.Vale of White Horse District, Shrivenham: Vale of White Horse, Oxfordshire, England
it.lifeSummary: Quando John Fowler IV è nato il nel 1350 nel Berkshire, England, il suo padre, John Fowler III, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Johan de Hartleigh, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Loveday nel 1378, nel Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1412, nel Buckinghamshire, England, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Bray, Berkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Fowler IVが1350年にイギリスバークシュアイアで生まれた時，父John Fowler IIIは30歳，母Johan de Hartleighは28歳であった。1378年にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアでMargaret Lovedayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1412年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアで62歳で死去し，イギリスバークシュアイアブレイにて埋葬された。

ko.Vale of White Horse District, Shrivenham: 영국 스퍼드실르 발 프 휘트 호르스
ko.lifeSummary: John Fowler IV(이)가 1350년 영국 버크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Fowler III(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Johan de Hartleigh(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1378년 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르에서 Margaret Loveday(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1412년 영국 벅잉함실르에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 버크실르 브라이에 묻혔다.

pt.Vale of White Horse District, Shrivenham: Vale of White Horse, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Fowler IV nasceu em 1350, em Berkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Fowler III, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Johan de Hartleigh, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Loveday em 1378, em Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1412, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Bray, Berkshire, Inglaterra.

ro.Vale of White Horse District, Shrivenham: Vale of White Horse, Oxfordshire, England

ru.Vale of White Horse District, Shrivenham: веил оф уит хаурс, оксфордшир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Fowler IV родился в 1350 г. в местности биркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Fowler III было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Johan de Hartleigh, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Loveday в 1378 г. в местности биркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1412 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности брэи, биркшир, Англия.

es.Vale of White Horse District, Shrivenham: Vale of White Horse, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra
es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Fowler IV nació en 1350, en Berkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Fowler III, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Johan de Hartleigh, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Margaret Loveday en 1378, en Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1412, en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Bray, Berkshire, Inglaterra.
